top_signals.title: The Coming Power War That Will Define the AI Era
top_signals.summary: Every great economic era has been defined by a fight over a single resource. In the 19th century, it was coal, and the British Empire was built on top of it. In the 20th century, it was oil, and the modern Middle East and American postwar dominance were both shaped by who controlled the flow. In the early 21st century, semiconductors became the world’s most critical asset, sparking the rise of Taiwan, growing trade tensions with China, and the creation of several multi-trillion-dollar tech giants. The next fight is already underway, and almost…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emirates Tel to Sell Vodafone Stake in $6 Billion Deal
top_signals.summary: Emirates Telecommunications Group Co. has agreed to sell a stake in Vodafone Group Plc to a vehicle controlled by the family of French billionaire Xavier Niel, in a deal valued at almost $6 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HSBC seeks buyers for Hong Kong subsidiary Hang Seng’s risky loans
top_signals.summary: Debt sale a sign of how UK bank intends to overhaul retail lender after taking it private
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
